results.title: The Art of Hood Training (Falconry Advice)
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain falconry hood-training guide; describes gradual-light hood acclimation for raptors but contains no LLM, inference-time, masking, or annealing mechanism. None of the multi-word content words appear as exact substrings (title/snippet have 'hood' alone, not 'falconry hood').

results.title: Hooding — NY State Falconry Association
results.judge_reason: Source-domain falconry association page on hooding manning principles; no LLM/inference content. Title+snippet mention 'hood' and 'manning' but not the exact multi-word content words 'falconry hood' or 'manning protocol' as substrings.

results.title: Falconry training and technique — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Source-domain Wikipedia article on falconry training; snippet explicitly contains 'manning protocol' as a substring. Pure animal-training content with no LLM mechanism, no inference-time masking, no risk-conditioned schedule.

results.title: Hooding and Birds of Prey (Avian Behavior International)
results.judge_reason: Source-domain avian behavior page on hooding for stimulus control in raptors; no LLM content. No multi-word content words match as substrings (has 'hooding' and 'stimulus' but not 'stimulus mask anneal' etc.).

results.title: Inference-Time Safety for Code LLMs via Retrieval-Augmented Revision (2026/3)
results.judge_reason: Inference-time safety via RAG-based revision surfaces security knowledge but is fundamentally a retrieve-and-revise pipeline, not a stimulus-mask anneal with risk-conditioned schedule and calm-receptive commit. Shares 'inference-time' and 'safety' lexically but no token-mask annealing or per-input mask schedule. No multi-word content words match as exact substrings.

results.title: Test-Time Adaptation for LLM Agents via Environment Interaction (2025/11)
results.judge_reason: Test-time adaptation via environment interaction modifies an agent through online interaction loops; does not perform per-input stimulus masking, mask annealing, or risk-conditioned commit gating. Operationally distinct from the candidate's hood-anneal firewall. No content words match as substrings.

results.title: Adaptive Inference-Time Compute: Mid-Generation Predict-Better (2024/10)
results.judge_reason: Adaptive inference-time compute with temperature annealing captures the temperature-anneal leg of the candidate and uses adaptive (difficulty-conditioned) sample allocation, which is structurally similar to risk-conditioned passes. However it lacks the explicit token-/stimulus-mask annealing leg (the core 'hood' element — high mask ratio so tokens cannot attend), lacks the calm-receptive low-energy commit gate, and is framed as exploration/exploitation sample budgeting rather than per-request safety firewall. Below 0.7 threshold. No multi-word content words appear as exact substrings ('inference-time' alone, not 'inference-time hood schedule'; 'annealing' alone, not 'stimulus mask anneal').

results.title: Inference-Time Computations for LLM Reasoning Benchmark (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Benchmark/survey of inference-time reasoning techniques; not a specific stimulus-mask anneal mechanism. Surveys many strategies but does not propose risk-conditioned per-input mask annealing with calm-receptive commit. No multi-word content words match as substrings.

fail_reason: No result satisfied any branch of the OR rule: max functional_equivalence was 0.6 (rank 7, adaptive inference-time compute — captures temperature anneal but lacks stimulus-mask leg and commit gate), max semantic_cosine_estimate was 0.42, and max keyword_overlap_count was 1 (Wikipedia 'manning protocol'). The candidate's risk-conditioned per-input stimulus-mask anneal with calm-receptive commit is not represented as a hit in any of the 8 results.
